studyMetadata.title: RTL Experiment Study - English Version
studyMetadata.description: A research study on how people read data visualizations to form intuitive answers to questions.

demographics.instruction: Before starting the study, please answer the following demographic questions.

response.prompt: From which country are you taking this survey?
How many years have you lived there?
In which country have you lived the longest?
What other languages do you speak fluently?
What other languages do you write fluently?
How often do you create or design charts or data visualizations?
How often do you encounter charts or data visualizations?

bar-1-u.description: Bar chart: How many days did the data collection last?
bar-1-u.instruction:
How many days did the data collection last?

*(Each bar in the graph represents one day.)*

bar-2-sst.description: Bar chart (sorted short-to-tall): Did the number of visitors increase or decrease?
bar-2-sst.instruction: Did the number of visitors increase or decrease over the course of the study?

bar-2-sts.description: Bar chart (sorted tall-to-short): Did the number of visitors increase or decrease?
bar-2-sts.instruction: Did the number of visitors increase or decrease over the course of the study?

bar-3-u.description: Bar chart (unsorted): How many visitors on the 5th day?
bar-3-u.instruction: How many visitors on the fifth (5th) day?

bar-4-sst.description: Bar chart (sorted short-to-tall): How many visitors on the 6th day?
bar-4-sst.instruction: How many visitors on the sixth (6th) day?

bar-4-sts.description: Bar chart (sorted tall-to-short): How many visitors on the 6th day?
bar-4-sts.instruction: How many visitors on the sixth (6th) day?

bar-5-u-1.description: Bar chart (1 holiday): How many holidays were there?
bar-5-u-1.instruction: How many holidays were there during the study?

bar-5-u-2.description: Bar chart (2 holidays): How many holidays were there?
bar-5-u-2.instruction:
How many holidays were there during the study?

*(A holiday is represented by a black bar.)*

parameters.note: A holiday is represented by a black bar.

bar-6-count-until.description: Bar chart: How many days have passed before the holiday?
bar-6-count-until.instruction:
How many days have passed before the holiday?

*(Do not include the holiday in your count.)*

parameters.note: Do not include the holiday in your count.

bar-6-count-from.description: Bar chart: How many days have passed after the holiday?
bar-6-count-from.instruction:
How many days have passed after the holiday?

*(Do not include the holiday in your count.)*

parameters.note: Do not include the holiday in your count.

bar-7-extract-before-u.description: Bar chart (unsorted): How many visitors on the day before the holiday?
bar-7-extract-before-u.instruction: How many visitors were there on the day before the holiday?

bar-7-extract-before-sst.description: Bar chart (sorted short-to-tall): How many visitors on the day before the holiday?
bar-7-extract-before-sst.instruction: How many visitors were there on the day before the holiday?

bar-7-extract-before-sts.description: Bar chart (sorted tall-to-short): How many visitors on the day before the holiday?
bar-7-extract-before-sts.instruction: How many visitors were there on the day before the holiday?

bar-7-extract-after-u.description: Bar chart (unsorted): How many visitors on the day after the holiday?
bar-7-extract-after-u.instruction: How many visitors were there on the day after the holiday?

bar-7-extract-after-sst.description: Bar chart (sorted short-to-tall): How many visitors on the day after the holiday?
bar-7-extract-after-sst.instruction: How many visitors were there on the day after the holiday?

bar-7-extract-after-sts.description: Bar chart (sorted tall-to-short): How many visitors on the day after the holiday?
bar-7-extract-after-sts.instruction: How many visitors were there on the day after the holiday?

line-1-u.description: Line chart: How many years did the data collection last?
line-1-u.instruction:
How many years did the data collection last?

*(Each dot in the graph represents one year.)*

line-2-sst.description: Line chart (sorted short-to-tall): Did the number of artworks increase or decrease?
line-2-sst.instruction: Did the number of artworks curated increase or decrease over the course of the study?

line-2-sts.description: Line chart (sorted tall-to-short): Did the number of artworks increase or decrease?
line-2-sts.instruction: Did the number of artworks curated increase or decrease over the course of the study?

line-3-u.description: Line chart (unsorted): How many artworks in the 5th year?
line-3-u.instruction: How many artworks were curated in the fifth (5th) year?

line-4-sst.description: Line chart (sorted short-to-tall): How many artworks in the 6th year?
line-4-sst.instruction: How many artworks were curated in the sixth (6th) year?

line-4-sts.instruction: How many artworks were curated in the sixth (6th) year?

line-5-u-1.description: Line chart (1 special artwork): How many years had a special artwork?
line-5-u-1.instruction: How many years had a special artwork received during the study?

parameters.prompt: Number of years with a special artwork:

response.prompt: Number of years with a special artwork:

line-5-u-2.instruction:
How many years had a special artwork received during the study?

*(A special artwork is indicated by a bigger dot.)*

parameters.note: A special artwork is indicated by a bigger dot.

line-6-count-until.description: Line chart: How many years before the special artwork year?
line-6-count-until.instruction:
How many years have passed before the year with the special artwork?

line-6-count-from.description: Line chart: How many years after the special artwork year?
line-6-count-from.instruction:
How many years have passed after the year with the special artwork?

*(Do not include the special artwork year in your count.)*

parameters.note: Do not include the special artwork year in your count.
